017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import java.net.*;
020import java.util.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
023
024
025/**
026 * Convenience class for representing a schema reference such as <js>"{'$ref':'/url/to/ref'}"</js>.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * An instance of this object is equivalent to calling...
030 *
031 * <p class='bjava'>
032 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema().setRef(<jv>uri</jv>);
033 * </p>
034 */
035public class JsonSchemaRef extends JsonSchema {
036
037   /**
038    * Constructor.
039    *
040    * <p>
041    * The value can be of any of the following types: {@link URI}, {@link URL}, {@link String}.
042    * Strings must be valid URIs.
043    *
044    * <p>
045    * URIs defined by {@link UriResolver} can be used for values.
046    *
047    * @param uri The URI of the target reference.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
048    */
049   public JsonSchemaRef(Object uri) {
050      this.setRef(uri);
051   }
052
053   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
054   public JsonSchemaRef addAdditionalItems(JsonSchema...value) {
055      super.addAdditionalItems(value);
056      return this;
057   }
058
059   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
060   public JsonSchemaRef addAllOf(JsonSchema...value) {
061      super.addAllOf(value);
062      return this;
063   }
064
065   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
066   public JsonSchemaRef addAnyOf(JsonSchema...value) {
067      super.addAnyOf(value);
068      return this;
069   }
070
071   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
072   public JsonSchemaRef addDef(String name, JsonSchema value) {
073      super.addDef(name, value);
074      return this;
075   }
076
077   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
078   public JsonSchemaRef addDefinition(String name, JsonSchema value) {
079      super.addDefinition(name, value);
080      return this;
081   }
082
083   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
084   public JsonSchemaRef addDependency(String name, JsonSchema value) {
085      super.addDependency(name, value);
086      return this;
087   }
088
089   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
090   public JsonSchemaRef addDependentRequired(String name, List<String> value) {
091      super.addDependentRequired(name, value);
092      return this;
093   }
094
095   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
096   public JsonSchemaRef addDependentSchema(String name, JsonSchema value) {
097      super.addDependentSchema(name, value);
098      return this;
099   }
100
101   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
102   public JsonSchemaRef addEnum(Object...value) {
103      super.addEnum(value);
104      return this;
105   }
106
107   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
108   public JsonSchemaRef addExamples(Object...value) {
109      super.addExamples(value);
110      return this;
111   }
112
113   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
114   public JsonSchemaRef addItems(JsonSchema...value) {
115      super.addItems(value);
116      return this;
117   }
118
119   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
120   public JsonSchemaRef addOneOf(JsonSchema...value) {
121      super.addOneOf(value);
122      return this;
123   }
124
125   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
126   public JsonSchemaRef addPatternProperties(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
127      super.addPatternProperties(value);
128      return this;
129   }
130
131   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
132   public JsonSchemaRef addPrefixItems(JsonSchema...value) {
133      super.addPrefixItems(value);
134      return this;
135   }
136
137   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
138   public JsonSchemaRef addProperties(JsonSchema...value) {
139      super.addProperties(value);
140      return this;
141   }
142
143   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
144   public JsonSchemaRef addRequired(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
145      super.addRequired(value);
146      return this;
147   }
148
149   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
150   public JsonSchemaRef addRequired(List<String> value) {
151      super.addRequired(value);
152      return this;
153   }
154
155   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
156   public JsonSchemaRef addRequired(String...value) {
157      super.addRequired(value);
158      return this;
159   }
160
161   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
162   public JsonSchemaRef addTypes(JsonType...value) {
163      super.addTypes(value);
164      return this;
165   }
166
167   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
168   public JsonSchemaRef setAllOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
169      super.setAllOf(value);
170      return this;
171   }
172
173   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
174   public JsonSchemaRef setAnyOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
175      super.setAnyOf(value);
176      return this;
177   }
178
179   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
180   public JsonSchemaRef setConst(Object value) {
181      super.setConst(value);
182      return this;
183   }
184
185   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
186   public JsonSchemaRef setContentEncoding(String value) {
187      super.setContentEncoding(value);
188      return this;
189   }
190
191   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
192   public JsonSchemaRef setContentMediaType(String value) {
193      super.setContentMediaType(value);
194      return this;
195   }
196
197   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
198   public JsonSchemaRef setDeprecated(Boolean value) {
199      super.setDeprecated(value);
200      return this;
201   }
202
203   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
204   public JsonSchemaRef setComment(String value) {
205      super.setComment(value);
206      return this;
207   }
208
209   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
210   public JsonSchemaRef setDefinitions(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
211      super.setDefinitions(value);
212      return this;
213   }
214
215   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
216   public JsonSchemaRef setDependencies(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
217      super.setDependencies(value);
218      return this;
219   }
220
221   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
222   public JsonSchemaRef setDependentRequired(Map<String,List<String>> value) {
223      super.setDependentRequired(value);
224      return this;
225   }
226
227   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
228   public JsonSchemaRef setDependentSchemas(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
229      super.setDependentSchemas(value);
230      return this;
231   }
232
233   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
234   public JsonSchemaRef setDescription(String value) {
235      super.setDescription(value);
236      return this;
237   }
238
239   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
240   public JsonSchemaRef setFormat(String value) {
241      super.setFormat(value);
242      return this;
243   }
244
245   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
246   public JsonSchemaRef setEnum(List<Object> value) {
247      super.setEnum(value);
248      return this;
249   }
250
251   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
252   public JsonSchemaRef setExamples(List<Object> value) {
253      super.setExamples(value);
254      return this;
255   }
256
257   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
258   public JsonSchemaRef setExclusiveMaximum(Number value) {
259      super.setExclusiveMaximum(value);
260      return this;
261   }
262
263   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
264   public JsonSchemaRef setExclusiveMinimum(Number value) {
265      super.setExclusiveMinimum(value);
266      return this;
267   }
268
269   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
270   @SuppressWarnings({
271      "removal", // Uses deprecated API for compatibility
272   })
273   public JsonSchemaRef setId(Object value) {
274      super.setId(value);
275      return this;
276   }
277
278   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
279   public JsonSchemaRef setMaximum(Number value) {
280      super.setMaximum(value);
281      return this;
282   }
283
284   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
285   public JsonSchemaRef setMaxItems(Integer value) {
286      super.setMaxItems(value);
287      return this;
288   }
289
290   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
291   public JsonSchemaRef setMaxLength(Integer value) {
292      super.setMaxLength(value);
293      return this;
294   }
295
296   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
297   public JsonSchemaRef setMaxProperties(Integer value) {
298      super.setMaxProperties(value);
299      return this;
300   }
301
302   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
303   public JsonSchemaRef setMinimum(Number value) {
304      super.setMinimum(value);
305      return this;
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
309   public JsonSchemaRef setMinItems(Integer value) {
310      super.setMinItems(value);
311      return this;
312   }
313
314   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
315   public JsonSchemaRef setMinLength(Integer value) {
316      super.setMinLength(value);
317      return this;
318   }
319
320   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
321   public JsonSchemaRef setMinProperties(Integer value) {
322      super.setMinProperties(value);
323      return this;
324   }
325
326   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
327   public JsonSchemaRef setMultipleOf(Number value) {
328      super.setMultipleOf(value);
329      return this;
330   }
331
332   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
333   public JsonSchemaRef setName(String value) {
334      super.setName(value);
335      return this;
336   }
337
338   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
339   public JsonSchemaRef setNot(JsonSchema value) {
340      super.setNot(value);
341      return this;
342   }
343
344   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
345   public JsonSchemaRef setOneOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
346      super.setOneOf(value);
347      return this;
348   }
349
350   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
351   public JsonSchemaRef setPattern(String value) {
352      super.setPattern(value);
353      return this;
354   }
355
356   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
357   public JsonSchemaRef setPatternProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
358      super.setPatternProperties(value);
359      return this;
360   }
361
362   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
363   public JsonSchemaRef setPrefixItems(JsonSchemaArray value) {
364      super.setPrefixItems(value);
365      return this;
366   }
367
368   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
369   public JsonSchemaRef setProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
370      super.setProperties(value);
371      return this;
372   }
373
374   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
375   public JsonSchemaRef setReadOnly(Boolean value) {
376      super.setReadOnly(value);
377      return this;
378   }
379
380   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
381   public JsonSchemaRef setRequired(List<String> value) {
382      super.setRequired(value);
383      return this;
384   }
385
386   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
387   public JsonSchemaRef setSchemaMap(JsonSchemaMap value) {
388      super.setSchemaMap(value);
389      return this;
390   }
391
392   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
393   public JsonSchemaRef setSummary(String value) {
394      super.setSummary(value);
395      return this;
396   }
397
398   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
399   public JsonSchemaRef setTitle(String value) {
400      super.setTitle(value);
401      return this;
402   }
403
404   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
405   public JsonSchemaRef setType(Object value) {
406      super.setType(value);
407      return this;
408   }
409
410   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
411   public JsonSchemaRef setUnevaluatedItems(JsonSchema value) {
412      super.setUnevaluatedItems(value);
413      return this;
414   }
415
416   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
417   public JsonSchemaRef setUnevaluatedProperties(JsonSchema value) {
418      super.setUnevaluatedProperties(value);
419      return this;
420   }
421
422   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
423   public JsonSchemaRef setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
424      super.setUniqueItems(value);
425      return this;
426   }
427
428   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchema */
429   public JsonSchemaRef setWriteOnly(Boolean value) {
430      super.setWriteOnly(value);
431      return this;
432   }
433}
